national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Philadelphia Gold & Silver Exchange, LLC
buyers.payout_claims: "up to 98% of market price" for gold and silver
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says "We weigh and test in front of you" — transparent in-person process, no specific method named.
buyers.evidence_notes: What We Buy page states "up to 98% of market price" and "Immediate Payouts: Get paid the moment you agree." Buys fine jewelry, luxury watches, estate items, Eagles, bars, sterling sets. Contact listed as "Sam." Hours not posted.

buyers.name: BEL Jewelers
buyers.payout_claims: "We pay based on the live gold market — not made-up numbers"; "We'll Beat Any Written Offer"
buyers.testing_transparency: "We test your gold's purity and weigh it right in front of you. You'll see the full calculation before anything is decided."
buyers.evidence_notes: Gold-buying page publishes live spot prices per troy oz, gram, and pennyweight by karat, updating every 15 minutes, with the caveat "actual buyback rates vary by condition and weight." Family-owned, "serving Philadelphia since 1984."

buyers.name: Philadelphia Jewelry Appraisers
buyers.hours: Mon–Fri 10am–5pm; Sat 11am–3pm; Sun closed (Radnor office by appointment)
buyers.payout_claims: "top payouts" and "fair, honest evaluations" — no percentages
buyers.testing_transparency: References "standard and advanced testing equipment" with evaluations conducted "right in front of you"; GIA Graduate Gemologist on staff.
buyers.evidence_notes: Located on Jewelers' Row at 740 Sansom St with a second Radnor/St. Davids office by appointment. Site states "no hidden fees" and offers parking discounts with appraisal purchase. GIA credential is the main trust signal.

buyers.name: 8th Street Gold & Diamond Buyers LLC
buyers.payout_claims: "fair market prices" and "highest trade value around" — no numbers
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site; offers free estimates with fast turnaround.
buyers.evidence_notes: Own contact page confirms 109 S. 8th St. address on "Philadelphia's historic Jewelers' Row" and claims "50+ years of experience." Site says estimates are free and staff can travel to customers.

buyers.name: Edelman's Coins
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on the site; emphasis is on in-person, no-pressure evaluation.
buyers.evidence_notes: Established 1926, four generations: "Being fair is the only way you stay in business for nearly 100 years." Site has an "Always Certified" section but names no specific certifications. Buys gold, silver, coins, bullion, and jewelry.

buyers.name: Cherry Hill Coins, Jewelry & Gold
buyers.address: 2110 Route 70 E, Unit 13, Cherry Hill, NJ 08003
buyers.payout_claims: "top dollar" and "some of the highest payouts in the industry" based on current market rates — no numbers
buyers.testing_transparency: Site describes on-the-spot testing during a "free, no-obligation appraisal"; no method details.
buyers.evidence_notes: Sell-your-gold page says "The price depends on various factors" and directs sellers to contact for personalized quotes. Buys 10k–24k jewelry, sterling flatware, silver coins, and scrap. Uses urgency framing ("demand for gold is at its near all-time high").

buyers.name: South Street Coins (South Street Coin & Jewelry Exchange)
buyers.payout_claims: "We pay more! It's a fact. Most jewelry stores and other stores that purchase coins and precious metals sell to us too."
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: We Buy page states they purchase "any item made of Gold, Silver, Platinum or Palladium," plus US/foreign coins, paper money, and bullion. The wholesale-to-the-trade claim implies dealer-tier pricing. Third-party sources claim 70+ years in business, but that is not stated on their own site.

buyers.name: Rittenhouse Estate Buyers
buyers.hours: Tue 11:30am–5pm; Wed 12pm–7pm; Thu–Fri 11:30am–5pm; Sat 12pm–4pm; Sun–Mon closed
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Rittenhouse Square estate jeweler, "est. 1985" / "for over 35 years, we built our reputation." Site has a dedicated "Your Neighborhood Gold Buyer" section offering "an instant cash offer" via walk-in or appointment.
